chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يُقَالُ عِنْدَ الزَّرْعِ وَ الْغَرْسِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 125 – What is to be said during the cultivation and the planting

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/338)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/338)

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ

text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ قَطْعِ السِّدْرِ فَقَالَ سَأَلَنِي رَجُلٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِكَ عَنْهُ فَكَتَبْتُ إِلَيْهِ قَدْ قَطَعَ أَبُو الْحَسَنِ ع سِدْراً وَ غَرَسَ مَكَانَهُ عِنَباً .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Nasr who said,

‘I asked Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> about cutting the lote (lotus) tree, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘A man from your companions did ask me<sup>asws</sup> about it, so I<sup>asws</sup> wrote to him: ‘Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> had cut a lote tree and planted a grape-vines in its place’.
en.sarwar: 7. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn abu Nasr who has said the following: “I once asked abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about cutting down a lotus tree. He (the Imam) said, ‘One of your people asked me about it and I wrote to him that abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, once cut down a lotus tree and planted in its place grape-vines.’”
